evidence: "Good plot. Mostly just gang-related crime drama with a little family feud thrown."
"This is now an epic nostalgia trip for former fans..."
"The plot makes no sense... episodic, not allowing for much character building nor climatic storytelling."
"The plot ruined what was otherwise a decent CG film."
"The ending was disappointing and some scenes were downright boring but the movie was fun."
"I liked Zero Charisma, but it could use improvement... allowing for a lot of boredom to set in."
"I don't expect the best animation quality, but this often just seemed lazily animated..."
"The animation quality is nothing special, but it isn't bad."
"The action sequences are just that cool."
"The CG scenes are pretty fun to watch despite being not-so-well thought out."
"Overall, the movie was an unforgettable experience that will stick with me for years to come."
"I liked it, but I entered the movie thinking it was going to be more of a kung fu film."

additional_patterns.name: plot_holes
evidence: "There are plot holes the size of meteors and open-ended dialogue that keeps you rolling your eyes in annoyance."

summary: The user enjoys action and crime drama genres, often with a nostalgic element. They prefer straightforward narratives but express frustration with plot holes and pacing issues, indicating a mixed emotional engagement with the content.
